summary: Mutation testing results: 73 killed, 1 survived, 0 no coverage. Mutation score: 98.65%
testQuality: Excellent coverage at 98.65%. A single ConditionalExpression mutant survives in the hasErrorField guard at line 68 of api-client.ts. The typeof value === 'object' check is not tested with a primitive JSON body (e.g., a JSON number) on an error response. All push() method mutants are fully killed.

suggestions.description: Mutant survived: ConditionalExpression — typeof value === 'object' replaced with true. No test exercises hasErrorField with a primitive JSON body on an error response.
suggestions.rationale: All existing error-response tests pass objects (plain objects or arrays) as the response body. When the server returns a primitive JSON value like a number (e.g., 42), typeof value is 'number' not 'object', so hasErrorField should return false and the fallback message 'Request failed' should be used. No test currently verifies this path.
suggestions.suggestion: Add a test in the 'error handling' describe block: fetchSpy.mockReturnValue(jsonResponse(42, 500)); await expect(client.getBoard('p1')).rejects.toThrow('500: Request failed'); — this exercises hasErrorField with a numeric JSON body and kills the mutant.
